hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' | { read -r f; case "$f" in */app/src/*.kt|*/sandbox/src/*.kt|*/core/src/*.kt) echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","additionalContext":"REMINDER: You must have an approved plan before editing source files. If you have not entered plan mode, created a plan, and received approval for this feature — STOP and do that first. Also update DECISIONS.md with any decisions made."}}' ;; *) echo '{}' ;; esac; }

jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' | { read -r f; case "$f" in */app/src/*.kt) echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","additionalContext":"PORT CHECK: You are editing a main app source file. Before marking this task complete you MUST: 1) Compare the sandbox version and the app version side-by-side to verify feature parity. 2) Check that ALL behaviors from sandbox are present in the app version — do not skip edge cases, clamping, animations, or gesture handling. 3) Build and install BOTH apps and confirm they behave identically."}}' ;; *) echo '{}' ;; esac; }
